hero.title: Complete Pharmacy Management Platform
hero.subtitle: Streamline your pharmacy operations with our all-in-one SaaS platform. POS, inventory, purchasing, reports, and more - all in one place.

features.title: Everything you need to run your pharmacy
features.subtitle: From POS to inventory, purchasing to reports - all the tools you need in one powerful platform

pos.title: Point of Sale
pos.description: Fast, barcode-enabled POS with shift management and receipt printing

medicine.title: Medicine Management
medicine.description: Complete medicine catalog with batch tracking and expiry alerts

inventory.title: Inventory Control
inventory.description: Real-time stock levels, low stock alerts, and multi-branch visibility

ocr.title: OCR Invoice Import
ocr.description: Automatically extract purchase data from invoices using AI

shifts.title: Shift Management
shifts.description: Track opening and closing cash, cash in and out, and shift reconciliation

reports.title: Reports and Analytics
reports.description: Sales, profit, stock, and expiry reports across all branches

branches.title: Multi-Branch Ready
branches.description: Manage unlimited branches from one account

barcode.title: Barcode Scanner Support
barcode.description: Works with USB barcode scanners and receipt printers

speed.title: Fast and Modern
speed.description: Built for speed with a clean, professional interface

security.title: Secure and Reliable
security.description: Your data is encrypted and backed up automatically

platforms.title: Works everywhere you work
platforms.subtitle: Access your pharmacy from web browsers or download our Windows desktop app

web.title: Web Application
web.description: Access from any device with a web browser. Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

desktop.title: Windows Desktop App
desktop.description: Native Windows app with offline support and hardware integration for barcode scanners.

cta.title: Ready to modernize your pharmacy?
